title: rubus vestitus var. courtoisianus
intro: Rubus vestitus var. courtoisianus, also known as the fragrant raspberry or Courtois's raspberry, is a variety of raspberry plant that is native to the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus vestitus var. courtoisianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Rubus vestitus var. courtoisianus can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
